max-header.description: Configure maximum number of bytes that should be copied from a sampled packet (default: 128) (The maximum number of bytes (Default: 128))

packet-sampling-rate.description: sFlow packet sampling rate, default is 1000

counter-polling-interval.description: sFlow counter polling interval, default is 20

management-link-utilization-percentage.description: percentage limit of the management link speed (Default is 30%)

randomize-source-port.description: 'enable': Randomize source port; 'disable': Fix source port 6343; 'packet-sampling-only': Only randomized source port for packet-sampling (Default);

default-counter-polling-mtu.description: Default MTU for counter-polling packets - DDoS 3.2 format only (Default: 1500)

append-mapping-info.description: Allow TPS to always send mapping ctr block (260, 271, and 272)

enlarge-zone-name.description: Allow TPS to packet up to 127 character zone names
